Estimate Space Use

Source: R/top_level_wrappers.R
estimate_space_use.Rd

Runs the space-use workflow from a raw GPS file through cleaning, kernel utilization distribution estimation, isopleth extraction, area calculation, and trip summaries.

estimate_space_use(
  file_path,
  col_map = NULL,
  max_speed = 100,
  speed_col = "Speed",
  interval_minutes = 30,
  colony_coords = c(lon = 0, lat = 0),
  kud_ref = "href",
  density_levels = c(50, 95)
)

Arguments

file_path

Character. Path to the raw GPS telemetry dataset.

col_map

Optional named character vector used for column standardization.

max_speed

Numeric. Maximum allowed speed for outlier filtering.

speed_col

Character. Speed column.

interval_minutes

Numeric. Track regularization interval.

colony_coords

Named numeric vector with `lon` and `lat`.

kud_ref

Character or numeric. Kernel bandwidth argument.

density_levels

Numeric vector of isopleth levels.

Value

A named list of space-use outputs.

Contents
